text.tspan: HISTORIC MERGE
@unhappychoice merges 15 PRs into github‑weekly‑reporter, turning the README into a live news channel
JUST IN
@unhappychoice deploys animated ticker to GitHub Pages; viewers now get real‑time headlines
KEYBOARD ON FIRE
@unhappychoice pushes 218 commits this week, averaging 31 per day – the DevOps torch is blazing
DEVELOPING
@unhappychoice adds four new themes, including a Swiss minimal design, proving style versatility
NO SURVIVORS
@unhappychoice approves 52 PRs across 10 repos, keeping the open‑source ecosystem healthy and lean
